title: Coastal map-post spacing fix
summary: The new coastal-scrub left-hand gather now reads under the existing COAST MAP anchor. This narrow fix separates the map-return post from the gather band without reopening coastal geometry, corridor runtime, or the broader waypoint phase.

execution_order.why_now: The new gather should read as sheltered habitat, not as map-return UI.

execution_order.goal: Separate the coastal gather from map-return range.
execution_order.why_now: A tiny anchor shift can preserve the new family beat before the lane moves on.

execution_order.goal: Review the coastal map-post spacing fix.
execution_order.why_now: Lane 3 should confirm the gather now reads clearly before preparing the next waypoint follow-on.

execution_order.goal: Prepare a waypoint rest or recovery follow-on.
execution_order.why_now: Once the coast family reads cleanly, the lane can move on to the next calm habitat beat.

guardrails: Do not change coastal-scrub platform or entity geometry in this fix.
Do not reopen corridor runtime or beach geometry.
Keep the map-return post reachable from a clear left-half interior approach.
The new gather proof should clear nearby map-return UI at the intended sheltered state.
